narrative:
Bexley City has 9,609 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.2 percentage points.
